title: How do you delete boards created from Monday’s templates?
excerpt: How do I delete boards that were created when choosing to use one of the Monday templates? When you click the button to the side of the board name, “Delete” is grayed out. I am also running into this same issue if I crea…

posts.author: Borderc21 (Chet Borden)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I delete boards that were created when choosing to use one of the Monday templates? When you click the button to the side of the board name, “Delete” is grayed out. I am also running into this same issue if I create a board from a board template I have created.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Borderc21 - try setting yourself as an Owner of the board. You should be able to delete it after.

Thanks!
Mark

posts.author: Borderc21 (Chet Borden)
posts.cookedHtml:
So it appears that I am the owner but the delete is still grayed out.

image1024×124 18.3 KB

posts.author: Id.land (Vlad Shaposhnikov)
posts.cookedHtml: Any resolution here? Dealing with a few boards I created for testing and now I can’t get rid of them. I’ve removed all data from these boards and they don’t have any automations or integrations or any visible tie to anything else in Monday.

posts.author: myoung (Mike Willyoung)
posts.cookedHtml: Hoping for an update - I’m having the same issue. I can’t delete the template boards. I am admin, board owner, and there are no integrations or automations.

posts.author: JoeW (Joe Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can archive template boards by setting yourself as the board owner, moving it into a folder then deleting the folder.
It’s still not deleted but at least it doesn’t clutter the workspace anymore.
